collection_strategy.collector_fix: Mew-X session exports under runtime\\mewx\\export\\sessions are preserved in the package exports bucket so run_metadata.json retains the session_summary pointer.
collection_strategy.selection_rule: Promote the latest fresh same-attempt PR9 pair that preserves exact event overlap and can be rebuilt end-to-end on the Mac control plane.

discarded_same_attempt_pair.label: resume-after-pr9-20260321T1729
discarded_same_attempt_pair.detail: Dexter startup serialization eliminated startup HTTP 429 on the successful attempt, but exact event overlap was negative: Dexter first raw event arrived 24.242 s after the Mew-X stream had already ended.

comparison_notes: Dexter stayed at 4/12 required event types on the promoted fresh PR9 pair.
Mew-X kept the restored session_summary export pointer but regressed from 9/12 to 8/12 required event types versus the earlier 0801 baseline.
The promoted PR9 pair recovered a longer exact event overlap at 167.174 s.
validate, derive-metrics, and build-pack were rerun successfully on the promoted PR9 pair.
No comparison area is yet decisively attributable enough to unlock TASK-006.

blockers.detail: A fresh PR9 same-attempt Dexter/Mew-X pair was collected and rebuilt end-to-end, but Dexter still validated only 4/12 required event types and Mew-X validated 8/12.
The preceding PR9 retry label resume-after-pr9-20260321T1729 cleared startup 429 but lost exact event overlap, so it could not serve as the promoted comparable pair.

The promoted Dexter pair still lacks candidate_rejected, entry_attempt, entry_fill, exit_fill, exit_signal, position_closed, run_summary, and session_update while running on the observe_live zero-balance safety path.
The promoted Mew-X pair still lacks candidate_rejected, creator_candidate, entry_rejected, and run_summary even though the session_summary export pointer is now present.
The promoted comparison pack exists, but winner/tie decisions remain deferred because the matched pair is still partial.
